CREATE TABLE test_table (id INT, name VARCHAR(100));
CREATE TABLE another_table (group_id INT, member_name VARCHAR(100));
SELECT group_id, listagg(member_name) FROM another_table GROUP BY group_id;
SELECT group_id, listagg(member_name ORDER BY member_name) FROM another_table GROUP BY group_id;
SELECT listagg(name) FROM test_table WHERE id IN (SELECT group_id FROM another_table WHERE member_name IS NOT NULL);
SELECT listagg(a.name || ', ' || b.member_name) FROM test_table a JOIN another_table b ON a.id = b.group_id GROUP BY a.id;
